nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Stratele was born about 1264, in Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Stratele, was 30 and his mother, Maud de Argentine, was 26. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes de Neyrnuit. He died in 1316, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Stratele est né environ 1264, à Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Stratele, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud de Argentine, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes de Neyrnuit. Il est décédé en 1316, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Stratele um 1264 in Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Stratele 30 und seine Mutter Maud de Argentine 26. Er hatte mit Agnes de Neyrnuit mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1316 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Stratele è nato il circa 1264 nel Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Stratele, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Argentine, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes de Neyrnuit. Morì nel 1316, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Strateleが約1264年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアメントモーで生まれた時，父Roger de Strateleは30歳，母Maud de Argentineは26歳であった。彼はAgnes de Neyrnuitとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1316年にイギリスイギリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Stratele(이)가 대략 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 멘트모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Stratele(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Argentine(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Agnes de Neyrnuit(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 영국 잉글랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Stratele nasceu aproximadamente 1264, em Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Stratele, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Argentine, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes de Neyrnuit. Ele faleceu em 1316, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Stratele родился около 1264 г. в местности ментмор, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Stratele было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Argentine, 26. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Agnes de Neyrnuit. Он умер в 1316 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Stratele nació aproximadamente 1264, en Mentmore, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Stratele, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maud de Argentine, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes de Neyrnuit. Murió en 1316, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
